summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Gleam LED website completed successfully. All backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend functionality verified. Contact form integration with MongoDB working properly. All requested features functional including navigation, product pages, contact form, and WhatsApp integration.
passed_tests: All 15 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Home page loads with hero section, features, products, and use cases
Navigation bar with logo and menu items functional - tested 7 navigation links
Products page with category tabs (All, Transparent LED, Indoor LED, Outdoor LED) - all 4 tabs clickable
Product detail page /products/transparent/lucid loads with specifications table
Contact form submission successfully saves to MongoDB with success message display
Use Cases page displays all applications correctly
About Us page loads with company information
Portfolio page loads with Project Gallery and category filters
WhatsApp floating button visible in bottom-right corner (green circular button)
3 WhatsApp integration links found throughout the site
Mobile responsiveness verified - responsive navigation detected
All navigation links work correctly - tested Products, Contact, Use Cases, About, Portfolio
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all 11 required features working)
